About

A finance professional
who writes.

"I didn't learn about finance to write about it. I spent 30 years inside it."

I'm Philippe Sautif. After three decades working in business and wealth management, I now do one thing: write financial copy that earns trust and drives action.

My clients are wealth managers, family offices, asset managers, and regulated financial professionals who need copy that's technically precise, compliance-aware, and genuinely persuasive — without sounding like it was written by a lawyer.

Wealth Management Family Offices Asset Managers CGP / IFA AMF · MiFID · FINMA Bilingual EN/FR Romandie · Paris · London
Let's work together →
Services

What I
deliver.

Precise, compliant, conversion-focused copy — written by someone who understands your world from the inside.

01

Financial Landing Pages

High-conversion pages for funds, wealth management offers, and regulated products. Built to earn trust in seconds.

02

Email Sequences

Nurturing sequences that educate prospects, handle objections, and move them toward a conversation — without pressure.

03

LinkedIn Content

Thought leadership content for financial professionals. Posts that position you as an authority and generate inbound inquiries.

04

Financial Product Sheets

Clear, compliant descriptions of complex financial products. Understandable to clients, defensible to regulators.

05

Website Copy

Full website copywriting for financial advisory firms. Every page positioned to attract the right clients and repel the wrong ones.

06

Conversion Audit

A rigorous analysis of your existing copy — landing page, emails, or website — with specific, actionable recommendations. First audit is free.

My Process

How I work.

Every engagement follows the same rigorous methodology — from understanding your market to delivering copy that performs.

01

Deep Discovery

I immerse myself in your offer, your clients, and your competitive landscape. No shortcuts.

02

Message Architecture

I build the strategic framework: key arguments, objection handling, tone, and conversion logic.

03

Writing & Refinement

I write, we review, I refine. Two revision rounds included on every project.

04

Delivery & Follow-up

Final files delivered in your preferred format. Available for questions after launch.

Free Audit

No portfolio.
Something better.

I launched this practice recently. Rather than showing fabricated case studies, I offer something more useful: a free, no-obligation audit of one of your existing pages or emails.

You'll see exactly how I think, how I work, and what I'd improve — before committing to anything.

1

Send me a link to your landing page, email sequence, or website page.

2

I analyze it through the lens of financial trust, compliance, and conversion.

3

You receive a written audit with specific, prioritized recommendations — within 5 business days.

Request your free audit →

"This audit is completely free. No pitch, no catch. I believe the best way to demonstrate 30 years of financial expertise is to show you — not tell you."

What the audit covers
  • —Trust & credibility signals
  • —Compliance red flags
  • —Message clarity & structure
  • —Conversion opportunities
  • —3 priority recommendations
